description_long: This object is a decorative wall-mounted frame featuring an arrangement of artificial succulent plants and greenery. The frame is square, black, and has a recessed center filled with a textured green background that mimics moss or grass. The lower half of the frame is densely populated with a variety of faux succulents in shades of green, gray, and pink, along with some small red accent plants and trailing foliage. The plants are arranged to create a lush, layered effect, with some elements extending outward from the frame. A small metallic label is affixed to the bottom right corner of the frame, suggesting a brand or plant identification. The back of the frame is solid and flat, designed for easy wall mounting.
description: A black square wall frame filled with artificial succulents and greenery, featuring a lush, colorful arrangement and a small metallic label.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full arrangement of succulents, greenery, and the metallic label on the bottom right.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim profile of the frame and the depth of the plant arrangement protruding from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid black back of the frame, with no visible plants or decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the frame's thinness and the outward extension of the plant elements.
